inputs.titre: Début de la construction de la Tour de Pise

reason: The image depicts the construction of the Leaning Tower of Pisa. The clothing and tools seem appropriate for the era. The general atmosphere is suitable. However, the building in the background to the right of the tower is significantly more advanced in its architecture than would be expected in 1173 Pisa. It has a Renaissance or Baroque style dome and architectural details, which would be anachronistic.
